description.name: Honeysuckle Cottage
description.headline: Charming stone cottage with walled garden in the Cotswolds
description.description: A 17th-century stone cottage tucked down a quiet lane in the village of Bourton-on-the-Water. Features original flagstone floors, exposed beams, and a wood-burning fireplace. The south-facing walled garden is perfect for lazy afternoons. Well-behaved dogs welcome.

reviews: Absolutely magical. The cottage is full of character and the garden is wonderful. Our dog loved it too!
Perfect countryside escape. Cosy, well-equipped, and in a beautiful village. Already planning a return trip.
The fireplace made our winter stay incredibly cosy. Highly recommend for couples or small families.
Lovely host, beautiful property. Walking trails straight from the door.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 14 days before check-in
